markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Interview Carly Piekos for the Account Strategist role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Role:** The Account Strategist (AS) is the PM for 3–5 clients, managing deliverables and quality within a pod structure. The AS connects the client to the Managing Editor (ME) and executes the high-level strategy set by the Account Director (AD).](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [**Candidate:** Carly Piekos has 7+ years of SEO/content experience, managing enterprise clients (Amex, Boeing) at iCrossing. Her background includes technical SEO, PM, and process development, including creating a new CSM onboarding at Conductor that cut training time by two months.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [**Company Need:** GrowthX needs to formalize its processes to support rapid growth. The ideal candidate will help define "jobs to be done" and build scalable systems, moving beyond the current ad-hoc workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [**Onboarding & Success:** Onboarding is a 1-week company intro, followed by shadowing 1–2 clients in Week 2. Success is defined by client retention and building strategic relationships that uncover future needs, not just delivering on contracts.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX: Company & Role Context

  - [**Model:** Agency built on an internal content platform, which will eventually become an external, tiered self-serve product.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [**Team Structure:** Pods are the core unit, with titles evolving.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
      - [**Account Director (AD):** Manages \~3 pods; sets high-level SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
      - [**Account Strategist (AS):** Manages 3–5 clients; PMs deliverables, quality, and KPIs.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [**Managing Editor (ME):** Creates content in the platform.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [**Client Onboarding:** A separate 8-week "strategy sprint" team handles initial setup (calibrating content, defining stakeholders). This ensures the AS receives a client with a clear strategy, enabling a smooth continuation of work.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)

### Candidate Experience & Skills

  - [**Background:** 7+ years in SEO/content, spanning in-house, agency, and SaaS roles.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [**Current Role (iCrossing):** SEO Manager for American Express and Boeing.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
      - [**Responsibilities:** Full project management, client communication, and deliverable creation.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
      - [**Coordination:** Manages internal teams (analysts, UX, dev) and uses client-specific tools (Confluence for Amex, Jira for Boeing) across three separate laptops.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
  - [**Process Improvement:**](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
      - [**Conductor:** Created a new CSM onboarding program that cut training time by two months.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
      - [**Motivation:** Driven by a passion for building useful, scalable systems.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)

### Project Management & Problem-Solving

  - [**Client Management:**](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
      - [Manages multiple enterprise clients by structuring the week around allotted hours per client.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
      - [Proactively communicates bandwidth and negotiates timelines, offering to push non-critical tasks to the next week.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
      - [Provides weekly progress updates (Thursdays) to maintain transparency.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [**Problem-Solving Example:**](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
      - [**Challenge:** A critical PowerPoint deliverable for Amex went off-track due to conflicting, subjective feedback from multiple internal stakeholders and the client contact.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
      - [**Action:** Piekos took ownership, consolidated feedback by prioritizing the primary client contact's input, and delivered the project on time.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
      - [**Outcome:** The client was impressed and used the deliverable for their own internal presentations.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)

### GrowthX: Onboarding & Success Metrics

  - [**90-Day Success Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
      - [**Client Retention:** The primary North Star metric.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
      - [**Process Definition:** Contribute to formalizing "jobs to be done" and scalable workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
      - [**Strategic Relationships:** Build trust to uncover future client needs, moving beyond simple task execution.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [**Onboarding Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
      - [**Week 1:** Company orientation.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
      - [**Week 2:** Begin shadowing 1–2 clients, aiming for a smooth handover with a director.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
  - [**Sales-to-Ops Handoff:**](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
      - [**Process:** The salesperson is highly collaborative, sharing contract language and scoping concerns with the ops team.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A strong pipeline allows the company to be selective, ensuring a good client fit and preventing over-promising.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
  - [**SEO Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1931.0)
      - [**Current:** Account Directors set high-level strategy within their pods.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1931.0)
      - [**Future:** A new SEO Strategist hire will centralize this function, potentially allowing Account Strategists to focus on execution.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1931.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
      - [Schedule an interview for Carly Piekos with Bridget (VP of Revenue Ops).](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
      - [Schedule a panel interview for Carly Piekos.](https://fathom.video/share/JzpA_HbUhHvYMNmYyPHrHcJpswpCos4_?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
